faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about iyibir WMS.

items.q: How does Logo Tiger integration work?
items.a: iyibir WMS connects to your Logo Tiger database via a read-only GoDb connection. This means all ERP data (customers, suppliers, products, stock, orders) flows directly into WMS in real time. The integration is one-directional: WMS reads data from Logo and writes completed warehouse transactions (e.g., waybills) back to Logo Tiger. Your existing ERP infrastructure is not disrupted.

For standard setups, initial go-live is typically 2–4 weeks: 1 week for technical installation and Logo integration setup, 1–2 weeks for data validation and configuration, and 1 week for user training. For complex multi-warehouse structures or custom integrations, this may extend to 6–8 weeks. We provide full support throughout the process.

items.q: Which mobile devices does the mobile app support?
items.a: The iyibir WMS mobile app is built with .NET MAUI, supporting Android 8.0+ and iOS 14+ devices. Industrial barcode scanners (Zebra, Honeywell, Datalogic) running Android are also fully supported. The app works with both the device camera and dedicated barcode scanner hardware.

items.q: How secure is the AI assistant? Does it access sensitive data?
items.a: The AI assistant operates via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and only accesses data you explicitly authorize. It is read-only and cannot modify data — a single assistant helps across all your operations with different capabilities (document scanning, stock queries, analysis). All communication is encrypted and your data is never shared with third parties or used to train AI models.

items.q: How is data security and KVKK compliance handled?
items.a: iyibir WMS is designed with KVKK (Turkish Personal Data Protection Law) compliance in mind. Data is stored in your own SQL Server database — you have full control. Role-based access control (RBAC) allows you to define exactly which users can access which data. All transactions are logged with full audit trail. You can choose on-premise or cloud hosting.

Yes. The mobile app supports offline mode for core operations such as barcode scanning, goods receipt, and counting. Transactions performed offline are automatically synchronized with the server when connectivity is restored. This is critical for warehouse environments with poor Wi-Fi coverage.

items.q: What barcode and RFID equipment is supported?
items.a: iyibir WMS supports all standard 1D and 2D barcodes (Code 128, EAN-13, QR Code, Data Matrix, etc.) via both device camera and dedicated scanners. It integrates with industrial scanners from brands such as Zebra, Honeywell, Datalogic, and Newland. RFID support can be added with additional hardware integration.

Yes. iyibir WMS is a modular platform and can be extended with custom modules, special reports, or unique integration requirements. Our team can develop new operation types, custom AI capabilities, or ERP integrations tailored to your business. Contact us to get a quote for your requirements.
